query:
-- Create a demo user in the users table (openId = "demo" for the demo mode)
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES ('demo-driver-autohaul', 'Demo Driver', 'demo@autohaul.app', 'demo', 'user', NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = 'Demo Driver', updatedAt = NOW();

-- Get the user ID and create the driver profile
INSERT INTO driver_profiles (userId, driver_code, name, email, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'D-00001', 'Demo Driver', 'demo@autohaul.app', 'active', NOW(), NOW()
FROM users WHERE openId = 'demo-driver-autohaul'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE driver_code = 'D-00001', updatedAt = NOW();
